title: chebel #2256
definition:
1) a cord, rope, territory, band, company
    1a) a rope, cord
    1b) a measuring-cord or line
    1c) a measured portion, lot, part, region
    1d) a band or company
 2) pain, sorrow, travail, pang
    2a) pains of travail
    2b) pains, pangs, sorrows
 3) union
 4) destruction
